demographics.living_situation: lives independently in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Sudden onset bald patch. I was brushing my hair and a huge clump just fell out, leaving a bald spot. I panicked.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I found the bald spot this evening and I'm really scared something serious is wrong with me — I couldn't wait until my regular clinic opens.

symptom_narrative.onset: this evening, while I was brushing my hair
symptom_narrative.duration: just a few hours since I noticed it
symptom_narrative.character: a clump of hair came out with brushing and left a smooth bald spot; earlier this afternoon the area was a little itchy
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the patch itself doesn't hurt at all, but I'm extremely anxious and upset about it
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it happened suddenly and hasn't changed since I noticed it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: I keep touching and checking it, which makes me more worried
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the bit of itch earlier; no pain, no rash that I've noticed, no feeling unwell
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this has ever happened to me before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm managing everything normally but I'm very distressed and keep looking in the mirror

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; describes feeling very anxious and frightened by the sudden change in appearance

communication_style.typical_message_style: worried, seeking urgent reassurance, catastrophising about serious illness

objective_data_offered.value: a single round bald patch on my scalp, maybe about 3 cm across; the skin there looks smooth and normal-coloured to me, I can't see any obvious flaking or redness
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: this is the patient's own lay visual impression over video and cannot substitute for a dermatological/dermoscopic examination — subtle scaling, redness, follicular changes or exclamation-mark hairs are not reliably self-assessed

objective_data_offered.value: I checked my temperature at home and it was normal, no fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single self-taken reading on a home thermometer
